articles.title: Mexico to request criminal charges over deaths following fatal shooting of Houston man by ICE agents
articles.description:
Mexico's president said Thursday that Mexico decided to “move beyond diplomatic channels” and escalate its complaints after an ICE agent killed a Mexican citizen in Houston this week

The post Mexico to request criminal charges over deaths following fatal shooting of Houston man by ICE agents appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mexico's president announced plans to escalate complaints over an ICE shooting incident.
The shooting involved a Mexican citizen in Houston, prompting international legal action.
Boston residents may see increased scrutiny on ICE operations and immigration policies.

articles.title: Who will replace Platner on the Maine ballot? These Democrats are raising their hands.
articles.description:
The Maine Democratic Party has said it will hold a nominating convention to choose the replacement.

The post Who will replace Platner on the Maine ballot? These Democrats are raising their hands. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine Democrats will hold a nominating convention to select a ballot replacement for Platner.
Several candidates have already expressed interest in running for the position.
The outcome could influence Boston's political landscape and voter turnout in upcoming elections.

articles.title: Patriots 2026 position preview: Running backs edition
articles.description:
Rhamondre Stevenson and TreVeyon Henderson headline a group that finished sixth in the NFL in rushing yards per game last season.

summary: Rhamondre Stevenson and TreVeyon Henderson lead the Patriots' running back group for 2026.
Last season, the Patriots ranked sixth in the NFL with rushing yards per game.
Strong running game could enhance local fan engagement and game attendance in Boston.

articles.title: Cyclist hit and killed by vehicle on Tremont Street
articles.description:
The victim died at the scene near Roxbury Crossing, police said.

The post Cyclist hit and killed by vehicle on Tremont Street appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cyclist was struck and killed by a vehicle on Tremont Street near Roxbury Crossing.
The incident occurred on July 9, 2026, with police confirming the victim died at the scene.
Local residents may face increased safety concerns for cyclists in the area following this tragedy.

articles.title: Massachusetts Senate passes bill targeting addictive social media features for kids
articles.description:
Infinite scroll, autoplay, and late-night notifications could be turned off under the proposal. How do you manage social media use at home?

The post Massachusetts Senate passes bill targeting addictive social media features for kids appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts Senate passed a bill to limit addictive social media features for children.
The proposal targets features like infinite scroll and late-night notifications.
This legislation aims to protect Boston youth from harmful social media habits.
